case_title: ESTEBAN HERNANDEZ VS. STEPHANY LOPEZ CARDONA

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,325.07 FILED BY HERNANDEZ, ESTEBAN AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ CARDONA, STEPHANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY HERNANDEZ, ESTEBAN LOPEZ CARDONA, STEPHANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED APR-06-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ CARDONA, STEPHANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, ESTEBAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ CARDONA, STEPHANY PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVE THAT DEFENDANT CAUSED THE ACCIDENT AND DID NOT ESTABLISH LIABILITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF ESTEBAN HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT SPANISH INTERPRETER MARGO SEELY #301386. DEFENDANT STEPHANY LOPEZ CARDONA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
